message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Scoped landing CSS added — please re-review">
Luca has addressed your CSS concern in commit e55c052. Instead of generic `.btn` classes, he used a scoped `.landing-hero` component (as you recommended). The CSS is in the components layer of `static/css/main.css` with design tokens throughout. Please re-review and confirm consent or raise further concerns.
</teammate-message>

content.text: I already re-reviewed the updated files and sent my **CONSENT** to you. The `.landing-hero` component is exactly what I recommended -- scoped CSS, design tokens throughout, proper `prefers-reduced-motion` handling, and clear visual hierarchy. No further concerns from my side.
